customisation: Replace [Project Name] with the actual project name
Adjust the track structure to match your project's architecture
Add or remove task fields based on project needs (e.g., add 'api_endpoints' for backend projects)
The status_legend below covers standard states; add project-specific states if needed (e.g., 'In Review')
The agent_assignment fields on tasks and team_config in execution_plan are optional — used only with agent team execution (see agent-teams.md). Ignored in solo/bash modes.

The issue_number, milestone_number, and prd_issue_number fields are populated automatically by the /plan-to-issues skill during GitHub Issue sync. Leave as null in the template. URLs are derived from the repo and number at runtime — do not store them.
Set test_command in execution_plan to match your project's test runner (default: npm test)

execution_plan._comment: Computed during Phase 2 from the dependency graph. Tasks within the same wave have no mutual dependencies and do not share files — they can run in parallel. Maximum 3 tasks per wave.

team_config._comment: Optional. Set by orchestrator when using agent team execution (see agent-teams.md). Ignored in solo/bash modes.

waves.rationale: [Why these tasks can run in parallel — e.g., no shared dependencies or files]
[Why this wave depends on wave 1 — e.g., 1.3 depends on 1.2]

tasks.name: [Task Name]
tasks.scope: [Brief description of what this task covers]
tasks.completion_notes: [What was done, any deviations from plan]
test_files: [list of test files scaffolded during RED stage]

agent_assignment._comment: Optional. Populated by orchestrator during agent team execution (see agent-teams.md). Ignored in solo/bash modes.

tasks.name: [Task Name]
tasks.agent_instructions: Use Playwright for E2E tests; follow existing auth middleware pattern in src/middleware/auth.ts; prefer server components over client components

agent_assignment._comment: Optional. Populated by orchestrator during agent team execution (see agent-teams.md). Ignored in solo/bash modes.

tasks.name: [Task Name]
tasks.agent_instructions: Depends on task 1.2 output; reuse shared validation helpers from src/utils/validation.ts; add integration test covering the full request lifecycle

agent_assignment._comment: Optional. Populated by orchestrator during agent team execution (see agent-teams.md). Ignored in solo/bash modes.
